steps.title: Research existing patterns
steps.description: Inspect the local codebase for similar features, helpers, tests, and UI conventions.
steps.acceptance_criteria: The plan records the local patterns it will follow.

steps.title: Research external constraints
steps.description: Check primary docs or current behavior for dependencies, libraries, APIs, or workflows that affect the plan.
steps.acceptance_criteria: External assumptions are either cited or explicitly marked as not needed.

steps.title: Write implementation plan
steps.description: Write the implementation plan with markdown task list items that can be materialized into an epic.
steps.acceptance_criteria: The source plan contains at least one '- [ ]' implementation task.

steps.title: Approve implementation plan
steps.description: Wait for explicit human approval before implementation work is generated.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Approval is recorded by a reviewer separate from the agent closing the step.
